new_articles.title: World's three largest memory chipmakers sued in US over DRAM supply shift to AI memory
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'World's three largest memory chipmakers sued in US over DRAM supply shift to AI memory'이다. A class-action lawsuit has been filed in the US against Samsung, SK hynix, and Micron, accusing them of restricting traditional DRAM supply to prioritize AI-focused memory. Plaintiffs claim this led to price hikes for consumer electronics. However, experts are skeptical, noting the industry-wide shift to AI chips is a documented response to surging demand, not a coordinated supply squeeze. The case faces a high bar for proof. The legal challenge accuses Samsung Electronics , SK hynix , and Micron Technology of restricting the supply of dynamic random-access memory, commonly known as DRAM , during their structural shift toward AI-focused hardware As per the news report, 17 plaintiffs, consisting of individual consumers and small businesses, filed the complaint in the US District Court for the Northern District of California last week The legal filing arrives at a time when memory manufacturers are capitalising on one of the strongest market upcycles in recent history Micron recently reported record quarterly financial results, while South Korean tech giants Samsung Electronics and SK hynix are both projected to post sharp earnings gains driven by sustained AI demand and elevated memory prices Add as a Reliable and Trusted News Source Add Now. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

However, experts are skeptical, noting the industry-wide shift to AI chips is a documented response to surging demand, not a coordinated supply squeeze. The case faces a high bar for proof.

new_articles.title: En Corée du Sud, « Samsung Electronics et SK Hynix sont les Mbappé et Dembélé des puces mémoire »
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'En Corée du Sud, « Samsung Electronics et SK Hynix sont les Mbappé et Dembélé des puces mémoire »'이다. Les deux géants coréens des semi-conducteurs ont annoncé leur intention d’investir plus de 450 milliards d’euros sur dix ans pour bâtir quatre nouvelles usines de production de puces mémoire, indispensables à la croissance mondiale de l’IA. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

new_articles.title: Samsung, SK Hynix mega South Korea chips gamble tests optimism of AI cycle
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung, SK Hynix mega South Korea chips gamble tests optimism of AI cycle'이다. South Korean tech giants Samsung and SK Hynix are investing billions in AI chip production, a move lauded by President Lee Jae Myung. While aiming to boost national capacity, analysts warn of potential oversupply risks if AI spending slows. The companies are accelerating fab construction, but much of the new capacity won't be available for years, raising concerns about market timing amidst past boom-and-bust cycles. " FROM CAUTION TO EXPANSION The soaring profitability of Samsung and SK Hynix's memory businesses is a relatively recent phenomenon, driven by the global AI boom and an acute memory-chip shortage that has nearly doubled chip prices in the first quarter alone Past downturns in chip prices have badly hit the companies, causing SK Hynix to flirt with bankruptcy in 2001 and driving both firms to post big losses in 2023 As recently as two months ago, SK Hynix Chairman Chey Tae-won expressed scepticism when asked by a lawmaker about plans for chip factories in the southwest Both Samsung and SK Hynix said they would now be able to speed up ‌construction in Yongin as the government had pledged to accelerate approvals, as part of efforts to meet surging demand During Monday's presentation attended by President Lee, SK Hynix's Chey said the company would monitor demand conditions as it determined the scale of investment but added that currently it was still difficult to fully address the supply shortage. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Korea taps Samsung, SK Hynix in $576 billion AI-chip drive to cement global leadership
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Korea taps Samsung, SK Hynix in $576 billion AI-chip drive to cement global leadership'이다. The plan, anchored by Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, marks Lee's boldest push yet to align South Korea's AI and chip ambitions ​with his pledge to narrow domestic regional disparities and revive economies beyond the Seoul metropolitan area. The plan, anchored by Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix , marks Lee's boldest push yet to align South Korea's AI and chip ambitions with his pledge to narrow domestic regional disparities and revive economies beyond the Seoul metropolitan area Samsung and SK Hynix will invest 800 trillion ‌won ($518 " HBM chips give pole position in AI race South Korea is emerging as a major winner from the surge in global AI investment, driven by Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix's commanding position in high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips essential to advanced AI processors Lee said at the event the company had selected Gwangju as a site for its new chip cluster, while SK Hynix's Chairman Chey Tae-won said the firm needed more time to finalise a site and secure infrastructure in the southwestern region Shares of Samsung and SK Hynix closed down 4. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: South Korea says Samsung and SK Hynix investing in AI, semiconductor mega-projects
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea says Samsung and SK Hynix investing in AI, semiconductor mega-projects'이다. Shares of Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix declined after South Korea unveiled sweeping artificial intelligence and semiconductor mega-projects. Samsung Electronics' stock was down 4 8%, while SK Hynix erased early losses of a near 6% decline to fall 1 Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix will each build two new semiconductor fabrication plants in South Korea's southwest as part of an 800 trillion won ($518 billion) national semiconductor ecosystem project, the government said Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix have emerged as central players in the artificial intelligence boom, with demand for high-bandwidth memory chips outpacing supply as cloud providers and technology firms race to expand AI infrastructure SK Hynix is the leading supplier of advanced HBM chips to Nvidia, while Samsung has been investing heavily to narrow the technology gap with its domestic rival. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Samsung to unveil record $650B South Korea investment amid AI boom
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung to unveil record $650B South Korea investment amid AI boom'이다. South Korea's Samsung Electronics is expected to announce a record domestic investment plan next week, according to local media reports, in a massive bet on AI-driven semiconductor demand. Make VnExpress a preferred source to prioritise our updates in your Google search results South Korea's Samsung Electronics is expected to announce a record domestic investment plan next week, according to local media reports, in a massive bet on AI-driven semiconductor demand The 1,000 trillion won (US$650 billion) package, to be announced by the chip giant and the government, is in line with President Lee Jae Myung's agenda for development in regions outside of the capital Seoul The president also reportedly met SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won last week Samsung Electronics last year posted an operating profit of 43 6 trillion won -- a 33% increase year-on-year. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: South Korea taps Samsung, SK Hynix in $745 billion plan to cement global AI chip lead
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea taps Samsung, SK Hynix in $745 billion plan to cement global AI chip lead'이다. Opposition politicians questioned whether the proposal is politically motivated. The plan, anchored by Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, marks Lee’s boldest push yet to align South Korea’s AI and chip ambitions with his pledge to narrow regional disparities and revive economies beyond the Seoul metropolitan area Samsung and SK Hynix will invest 800 trillion won (S$671 billion) with suppliers to build two new chip fabrication sites each in South Korea’s south-west region, Industry Minister Kim Jung-kwan said President defends plan High-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips produced by Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix have become pivotal in the global race to build advanced AI systems Lee said at the event that the company had selected Gwangju as a site for its new chip cluster, while SK Hynix’s chairman Chey Tae-won said the firm needed more time to finalise a site and secure infrastructure in the south-western region 8 per cent while SK Hynix lost 1. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
